outlook_paragraph: Satellite data as of July 2024 shows zero active drilling sites for SM, with no newly or continuously active pads and a sharply negative relative activity delta of -1.5, indicating a complete halt in drilling operations. This suggests minimal near-term production growth into the June 2024 quarter. With realized prices at a discount to WTI and only 55% exposure to the targeted segment, revenue is constrained despite relatively stable WTI prices around $81.30. The deterministic forecast of $558.45M reflects these headwinds, anchored below consensus due to absent drilling momentum.
